description:
Add a new helper function to e2e/harness/lib/assertions.sh that checks multiple commands exist in a single devshell session.

Current pattern (slow - N devshell invocations):
  assert_command_in_devshell "buck2"
  assert_command_in_devshell "go"
  assert_command_in_devshell "godeps-gen"

New pattern (fast - 1 devshell invocation):
  assert_commands_in_devshell buck2 go godeps-gen

The helper should:
- Accept multiple command names as arguments
- Check all commands exist in single devshell call
- Report which command(s) are missing on failure
- Exit with proper error code

Expected savings: ~13-15s per command after the first
title: Add assert_commands_in_devshell helper for batch checks
